title: Model
description: Model data used to create instances of models on nodes. Models **MAY** be referenced by a URI (or IRI) or a buffer view index.

uri.description: The URI (or IRI) of the model.
uri.gltf_detailedDescription: The URI (or IRI) of the model.  Relative paths are relative to the current glTF asset.  Instead of referencing an external file, this field **MAY** contain a `data:`-URI. This field **MUST NOT** be defined when `bufferView` is defined.

mimeType.description: The model's media type. This field **MUST** be defined when `bufferView` is defined.

bufferView.description: The index of the bufferView that contains the model. This field **MUST NOT** be defined when `uri` is defined.
